raw.subject: Gabby Nails & Spa Studio in Atlantic City; Your Atlantic City page caught my eye.
raw.body:
Hi,

The Black Angus heritage of your nail art caught my eye. The attention to detail and beauty of the pieces you share on your page is impressive.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which means potential clients may have to look elsewhere for salon information or to book appointments online.

I sketched a simple page idea from what you post on Facebook, featuring a services menu, a work gallery showcasing your nail art, a prominent booking CTA, and hours & location information.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/gabby-nails-spa-studio-atlantic-city

I think building out a site like this would be a straightforward project, with a flat fee for local businesses looking to establish an online presence. If you'd like to discuss further, feel free to reply or give me a quick call to get started.
